column1: # Gateway-estate corpus. Each row is one API imported end-to-end through
# and gated by the estates lane (tools/corpus/run.mjs estates) against
# `fixture` is repo-relative. These reuse the golden estate fixtures so the
# CLI-level differential and the projection golden test share one realistic
# corpus (plugin zoo, auth scopes, quotas, opaque policies). Kong appears twice
# to exercise the multi-API selection path.
